name: Dhia Dahmeni
description: Dhia Dahmeni. Machine learning systems, computer vision, runtimes and low-level software.

descriptions.Car Detector v2.0.md: Vehicle extraction and classification with YOLOS, XResNet, FastAPI and a custom inference pipeline.
descriptions.Car Detector.md: Car make, model, year and color classification from a 20,000-image dataset.
descriptions.Hyperparameter Tuning With Bayesian Opti: Gaussian processes and Bayesian optimization applied to hyperparameter search.
descriptions.Time series forecasting.md: An LSTM experiment on hourly Bitcoin prices, including data exploration and model evaluation.
descriptions.C compilation under the hood.md: C preprocessing, compilation, assembly and linking.
descriptions.What Happens When you Type “ls -l *.c” i: Shell parsing, glob expansion, process creation and program execution.
descriptions.Hard links vs Symbolic links, What’s the: How inodes and directory entries give hard and symbolic links different behavior.
descriptions.C static libraries.md: How static archives are built, indexed, linked, and used in C programs.
descriptions.Static Libraries vs Dynamic Libraries in: Static and dynamic linking in C.
descriptions.Activation.md: Binary, linear, sigmoid, softmax, tanh and ReLU activation functions.
descriptions.Optimization.md: Feature scaling, mini-batches, batch normalization, momentum, RMSProp and Adam.
descriptions.Regularization in ML.md: L1, L2, dropout, data augmentation and early stopping.
descriptions.Summary of the AlexNet paper.md: Architecture notes from the AlexNet paper.
